name: Mailchimp
one_line: Email marketing platform for campaigns, automation, and audience management
self_serve_detail: Create a (free) Mailchimp account, then generate an API key in Account > API Keys with no human approval; OAuth2 app flow available for third-party access.
api_surface: REST broad (Marketing v3, hundreds of endpoints)

name: Klaviyo
one_line: Email and SMS marketing automation platform with data-science-driven segmentation
self_serve_detail: Log in (free/test account) and generate a private API key or register a public OAuth app; no human approval to obtain credentials.
api_surface: REST broad (JSON:API: profiles, lists, campaigns, flows, metrics, catalogs)

name: Pinterest
one_line: Visual discovery and ads platform; API for Pins, Boards, ads, catalogs, and conversions
self_serve_detail: Create a business account, accept Developer TOS, then submit a Connect app request form; Trial access (app ID/secret) is granted only after human review (each business day). Standard/production access, including creating Pins, requires a second review with an OAuth demo video.
blocker: App review required for Trial access to obtain OAuth credentials; production write endpoints (e.g. Pin creation) require a second Standard-access review with a demo video.

name: SendGrid
one_line: Transactional and marketing email delivery API (Twilio SendGrid)
self_serve_detail: Free SendGrid plan lets you create API keys in the dashboard (Settings > API Keys) with scoped permissions; no human approval. Some features (dedicated IP, subusers) need paid tiers.
api_surface: REST broad (v3: mail, suppressions, marketing, stats)

name: Shopify
one_line: Ecommerce platform with Admin API for products, orders, customers, and store management
self_serve_detail: Free Partner account + dev store; create a custom app in the admin to get an access token (X-Shopify-Access-Token) with no approval, or build a public app via OAuth. No paid plan required to obtain credentials.
